[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 10101000 3
6 00000001 1
7 10101100 4

01 10 00011100 3
12 21 00001100 2
23 32 00101010 3
34 43 00010001 2
45 54 00010001 2
56 65 00000001 1 match 6
67 76 00000001 1 match 6
70 07 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4

02 20 10101100 4 match 7
13 31 00011001 3
24 42 10000000 1
35 53 00010001 2
46 64 10000001 2
57 75 01000001 2
60 06 10101000 3 match 5
71 17 00000001 1 match 6

03 30 00111000 3
14 41 00010001 2
25 52 01000000 1
36 63 00101001 3
47 74 00000001 1 match 6
50 05 00010000 1
61 16 00001001 2
72 27 01000000 1

04 40 10010000 2
15 51 00010001 2
26 62 10101000 3 match 5
37 73 00000001 1 match 6
[completion]
